name: akbun-learning
description: Study and learning helpers — English and Japanese practice tools, plus YouTube transcript walkthroughs in Korean

interface.shortDescription: English / Japanese study and YouTube transcript walkthrough skills
interface.longDescription: Learning support skills for Korean learners — English pronunciation guidance, Japanese study tooling, and a YouTube transcript walkthrough that downloads captions with yt-dlp and produces a Korean markdown report.
defaultPrompt: Break down this English sentence for a Korean learner
Turn this Japanese study material into an Anki deck
Explain the pronunciation and stress in this phrase
이 유튜브 영상 자막으로 풀어 설명해줘: <YOUTUBE_URL>
